title: Adoption Day at the Park
description: Come meet our adorable adoptable dogs in person! Our volunteers will be on-site to answer questions about the adoption process, foster opportunities, and volunteer roles. You might just find your new best friend!

title: Pet Care Seminar: Nutrition & Training
description: Learn the essentials of responsible pet ownership from certified veterinarians and behavioral trainers. Topics include puppy nutrition, positive reinforcement training, and managing separation anxiety.

title: Annual PawHope Charity Gala
description: Our biggest fundraiser of the year! Join us for a night of inspiring rescue stories, silent auctions, live music, and dining. All ticket sales and donations go directly towards our emergency medical fund for injured strays.

title: Free Rabies Vaccination & Microchip Drive
description: To support local pet owners, we hosted a free vaccination and microchipping clinic. Over 150 community pets received free care, helping keep our neighborhood dogs healthy and safe.
